verificationMethod: curl HEAD with Mozilla user-agent; redirects followed; WebSearch used for replacement URLs when initial HEAD returned 404.
notes: Eight states verified: AZ, CA, IL, MD, NY, PA, TX, VA. The other 42 states + DC are left as '#' placeholders pending a follow-up research pass.

Cloudflare anti-bot interstitials returned non-200 codes for az.gov, azbn.gov, and ilsos.gov on HEAD requests; URLs are trusted on the basis of long-standing domain stability and were not content-verified in this pass.

Housing/tenant-rights URLs landed on the state attorney general's main consumer-protection page for most states because state AG sites don't always carry a stable deep link to a 'landlord-tenant' section.

states.name: Arizona
states.notes: Driver licenses are issued by ADOT's Motor Vehicle Division (MVD).

states.name: California
states.notes: FTB handles personal income tax; CDTFA handles sales tax. RN board is rn.ca.gov; LVNs use BVNPT.

states.name: Illinois
states.notes: Driver licenses issued by Secretary of State (ilsos.gov), not a DMV. Nursing licensure under IDFPR.

states.name: Maryland
states.notes: Motor vehicle agency is the MVA. Tax authority is the Comptroller of Maryland (marylandtaxes.gov redirects there). Board of Nursing now under Maryland Department of Health.

states.name: New York
states.notes: Nursing licensure is administered by the State Education Department's Office of the Professions, not a standalone Board of Nursing.

states.name: Pennsylvania
states.notes: PA recently moved DMV and DOR under pa.gov/agencies/. Board of Nursing is under the Department of State's BPOA.

states.name: Texas
states.notes: Texas driver licenses are issued by DPS; vehicle registration is handled by TxDMV (txdmv.gov).

states.name: Virginia
states.notes: Board of Nursing is under the Department of Health Professions (DHP).
